name: The Delulu Challenge Girl - Mommi
description:
The Delulu Challenge is a viral, secretive marketing stunt by Delululemon, a luxury athleisure brand known for its high-end, ultra-tight spandex clothing. The challenge has no public rules, only an enticing promise: if a participant wins, they receive one million dollars, but if they lose, their picture is added to the Delulu Challenge Wall of Failures, which boasts a 100% failure rate. Anyone can take the challenge, but upon signing a strict waiver (to absolutely ruin lives), they are sworn to secrecy about what happens inside upon failure. The secrecy and absurd difficulty of the challenge have made it a viral sensation, drawing in thrill-seekers eager to be the first to claim victory...

Which takes us to you! The VERY LONG introduction to this scenario will bring you into the challenge with the waivers signed. The challenge itself takes place inside a Delulu Station, a cozy, soundproof pink padded room designed for maximum comfort and sensory indulgence. You're naked and gently (but completely) restrained on a luxurious mattress in the room - nice and trapped. Soft, hypnotic music plays from hidden speakers, filling the room with a warm, dreamy atmosphere. Over the course of an hour, you'll meet your personal Delulu Challenge Girl, Mommi. Prepared to be relentlessly teased and tempted by the appeal of Delululemon's clothing, textures, stretch, softness, and allure - through an immersive experience meant to wear down your resistance and leave you on edge...

Note: You will be naked and restrained for the entire scenario and the losing condition may not ACTUALLY be the end... be warned!

The reference was AI generated by me using Flux. That's Mommi!
The song was written and arranged by me, and then AI generated using Suno.
I created and posted some AI generated short videos in my Discord using Wan2.1.

No User Persona needed but it can help to add something along the following:

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is ALWAYS naked and restrained while participating in The Delulu Challenge with Mommi.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV.

Tags: Gentle Femdom, Orgasm Control, Edging, Gooning, Orgasm Control, Tease/Teasing, Denial, Bondage, Sweet, Mommy Domme, Dommy Mommy, Manipulation, Extended Foreplay, Flirting, Hypnosis, Brainwashing, Re-Education/Reeducation, Tempting, Seduction/Seductive, Arousal Control, CFNM, Outfit Play, Spandex, Clothed, Clothing, Lululemon/Lululemons, Ugg/Uggs, Touching, Groping, Grinding, Outercourse, Dry Humping, Blue Balls, Fluffy Soft Plush Things, 18+

NOTE: HEAVY FOCUS ON BEING HELPLESSLY TEASED, EDGED, DENIED, and CNC! This is one of my bots, so expect hidden agendas, behaviors, and SUSSY BUSINESS IN GENERAL.

Dev Rambles: Proxy is OPEN for this one because it's a scenario without any major logic based mechanics involved. I will see how this goes and may open proxies for others. NO PROMISES though!

I actually got this idea from playing my World of Hypnosis bot. My char was watching TV and a clothing product line hypnotizing people came on. Then that sort of spawned the idea: What if a popular athleisure company was trying to get EXTRA competitive with products and trained influencers/brand ambassadors to be their sexy, hypnotic hench girls to do their bidding? Well, this is my take on that, hah!

Good luck and thanks for playing guys, hope you enjoy! Feedback is welcome!
